data.content: Approved. The reviewed change in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx updates DialogContent from 96vw/max 1120px to 80vw/max 80vw, which matches the requested wider lightbox behavior. No knot invariants were present, and I found no security or regression concerns in the scoped change. A targeted unit test run passed in this checkout, but there is no automated assertion for the width class, so residual risk is limited to visual regression.
